subject: Migrate externalapi-nbi docs
commit_message:
Migrate externalapi-nbi docs

Merging this will create
https://onap-externalapi-nbi.readthedocs.io
This build will run in parallel
to the current docs generation method
until we are ready to cut over.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-364
Signed-off-by: Jessica Wagantall <jwagantall@linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: I498cef0126dd202cc17f389bae3da38b73484588

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/externalapi-nbi-master-verify-java/447/ )

Jessica, you need to update the pom.xml to exclude the license check on the docs yaml files that you want to add

 <exclude>docs/conf.yaml</exclude>
 <exclude>.readthedocs.yaml</exclude>

in section 
<plugin>
        <groupId>com.mycila</groupId>
        <artifactId>license-maven-plugin</artifactId>
